personal.name: Akhil
personal.title: Builder, directed by AI
personal.bio: I'm a student in India with no formal coding background and an unreasonable amount of curiosity. I treat large language models less like autocomplete and more like a band I'm conducting — I set direction, structure, and judgment; they play the notes. It's a different way of building, and it's only getting louder.

projects.title: ROCm Bridge
projects.description: AMD's GPUs run on ROCm. Most existing AI code is written for CUDA, NVIDIA's platform. This tool reads CUDA and writes back ROCm-compatible code, so a project isn't locked to one company's hardware.

projects.title: Echo
projects.description: Long lectures and podcasts hide their best lines deep in the runtime. Echo transcribes a video, indexes it, and answers questions with the exact timestamp where it was said.

projects.title: Next signal: yours?
projects.description: This channel's unassigned. If you've got a problem worth automating, route it through — I'll bring the AI, you bring the brief.

blog.description: Thoughts on AI, building in public, and conducting machines
